flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Edgewood College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.6k → $35.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Edgewood College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.6k → $35.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Edgewood College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
